steps.name: launch_and_render
steps.note: App launched but rendered an empty native root.

rendered_text_sample: Find a fair room, confirm entry once, play under clear rules, and keep every result easy to prove.
GC / 0 online / chizzydev250: Give me some time, I'll put you through.
